question.title: PR-A3 executor + policy enforcement + adapter invocation — implementation plan v1 adversarial review (iter 1)
question.body:
PR-A3 (FAZ-A Tranche A 4/6) plan v1: 6 executor modules + fixtures/codex_stub.py + 5 tests. Scope: ilk kez subprocess/HTTP adapter invocation + policy_worktree_profile runtime enforcement + evidence events JSONL emission.

8 spec-level soru (plan §16):
Q1 Single-step vs multi-step API scope
Q2 Subprocess hermeticity + PATH source
Q3 Evidence event ordering + manifest + ULID
Q4 HTTP response handling + text/plain fallback
Q5 Cross-ref re-validation timing
Q6 fixtures/codex_stub.py package location
Q7 Adapter output parse order
Q8 Testing philosophy (unmocked subprocess CI budget)

Bozulmaz ilkeler: POSIX-only, CAS tek yazma yolu, core dep değişmez (jsonschema only), fail-closed, narrow facade.

Context refs: .claude/plans/PR-A3-IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md (v1, 735 LOC), ao_kernel/defaults/schemas/{agent-adapter-contract,workflow-run,workflow-definition}.schema.v1.json, ao_kernel/defaults/policies/policy_worktree_profile.v1.json, ao_kernel/workflow/run_store.py, ao_kernel/workflow/registry.py, ao_kernel/adapters/manifest_loader.py, ao_kernel/_internal/evidence/writer.py, ao_kernel/_internal/prj_kernel_api/llm_transport.py, ao_kernel/_internal/roadmap/step_templates.py, docs/WORKTREE-PROFILE.md, docs/EVIDENCE-TIMELINE.md, docs/ADAPTERS.md, CLAUDE.md.
